title: prunus × lannesiana f. stellata
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. stellata, also known as the flowering cherry, is a deciduous ornamental tree that belongs to the Prunus genus. The plant is valued for its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures. The bark and flowers of Prunus × lannesiana f. stellata are known to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are said to provide health benefits such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function.
